Meta.siteTitle: Malinska Stay – Apartments on Krk Island
Meta.siteDescription: Apartments in Malinska on the island of Krk – book directly at Apartments Eva, Luxury Apartments Marty and House Art. No commission fees, close to the sea and the centre of Malinska.

Home.heroSubtitle: Pick from House Art, Luxury Apartments Marty or Apartments Eva to see available dates and prices.
Home.sectionTitle: Three properties for your family holiday
Home.sectionDescription: Malinska is a quiet town on the western side of the island of Krk, known for its seaside promenades, beaches, restaurants and relaxed atmosphere — perfect for a family holiday.

quickOverview.houseArt: House Art — house for up to 10 guests + private pool
quickOverview.marty: Marty — 5 apartments + pool for Marty guests

houseArt.opis: A private house sleeping up to 10 guests, with 5 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a private pool reserved exclusively for House Art guests.

marty.opis: Five apartments in varying sizes, ideal for families and larger groups. The property has its own pool reserved for Marty guests.

eva.opis: Three apartments for 4+2 guests, each with two bedrooms and one or two bathrooms.

common.extraGuestsNote: extra beds in the living room

eva.intro: Apartments Eva offers three units. Eva 1 spans the ground and first floors, while Eva 2 and Eva 3 are located on the first floor.

apartmaniOpis.Eva 1: Ground and first floor · 2 bedrooms · 2 bathrooms · open-plan living and kitchen · terrace
apartmaniOpis.Eva 2: First floor · 2 bedrooms · 1 bathroom · open-plan living and kitchen
apartmaniOpis.Eva 3: First floor · 2 bedrooms · 1 bathroom · open-plan living and kitchen

marty.intro: A complex of five apartments in varying sizes. Every apartment has access to the shared pool reserved for Marty guests.

apartmaniOpis.Marty 1: Ground floor · 1 bedroom · open-plan living and kitchen · terrace
apartmaniOpis.Marty 2: Ground floor · 2 bedrooms · 2 bathrooms · living room · terrace
apartmaniOpis.Marty 3: 1st floor · 1 bedroom · open-plan living and kitchen · balcony
apartmaniOpis.Marty 4: 1st floor · 2 bedrooms · 2 bathrooms · living room · balcony
apartmaniOpis.Marty 5: 2nd floor · large terrace · open-plan living and kitchen · 3 bedrooms · 3 bathrooms

house-art.heroSubtitle: Private house for up to 10 guests · shared pool
house-art.intro: House Art is a private holiday home with 5 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a pool shared with Luxury Apartments Marty.
house-art.fallbackOpis: A private house with multiple bedrooms, bathrooms, a living area and a kitchen.

nova.metaDescription: Book apartments on Krk Island directly with no commission fees. Apartments Eva, Marty and House Art in Malinska.

eva.title: Apartments Eva – Malinska, Krk
eva.description: Apartments Eva in Malinska on Krk Island: 3 apartments with 2 bedrooms each, sleeping up to 6 guests per unit. Book directly with no commission fees.

marty.title: Luxury Apartments Marty – Malinska, Krk
marty.description: Luxury Apartments Marty in Malinska on Krk Island: 5 apartments with a shared pool, ideal for families and larger groups. Book directly online.

house-art.title: House Art – Private house in Malinska, Krk
house-art.description: House Art is a private house in Malinska on Krk Island sleeping up to 10 guests, with 5 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a shared pool.
